name: google-workspace-mcp
description: Multi-account Gmail + Google Calendar + Google Drive + Google Tasks MCP server. Every tool takes an `account` slug (e.g. `work` | `personal`), so one Claude session can act across several Google accounts in parallel — send/draft/delete email, manage calendars, move/upload/share Drive files, and manage tasks. Accounts are configured at runtime (bring your own OAuth client); a per-project .mcp.json scopes each project to specific accounts. A self-built replacement for the single-account default connector.
